Registering the refusal makes the boundary stop durable against re-litigation and keeps the frozen thresholds attached to the mechanism they price.

claim: NLB l3a audit r1 protocol, CORRECTED-COUNT SUCCESSOR of ASM-0422 (supersede-by-citation; the ASM-0422 line stands as append-only history and is no longer cited by the l3a-parse/a5-nl records): the protocol is unchanged - (i) mechanically re-score the COMMITTED judge transcript (sha256 7f3f2291a7e46fb554e7477fc92ff3611d4a0131e117aa5c027960563f36fb1a) restricted to the in-scope covered sampled items, (ii) top the covered-only sample to 60 via a FRESH judge identity given ONLY new in-scope items (same pinned prompt-audit.md, same deterministic sample rule over the 7 in-scope families, already-judged qids skipped), no item ever judged twice, original audit artifact never overwritten - but the provenance arithmetic in ASM-0422's rationale was wrong: the original committed audit sample contains 28 (not 27) in-scope covered items, so r1 = 28 mechanically re-scored + 32 (not 33) fresh-judge items. The 60/60 r1 gate result is unchanged.
backing_ref: data/nlb-phrasings-l3a/audit-recoverability-r1.json sha256 57e9d8d12826ae6ba28da4289fcc703109b2fb9994ef99eb589655874ea6da6d; original audit sha256 d6365bd95e7d61a1cce7585bb446aa8f905b2b8eec08d0756a446e2e70a09bf5; tools/experiments/nlb/EVAL-BUILD-SPEC.md step 5
rationale: The round-2 independent skeptic held (correctly) that an append-only register still CITED by live records must carry a mechanical superseding correction, not a prose disclaimer in the design doc: the 27+33 arithmetic in ASM-0422's rationale contradicts the committed r1 artifact (28 rescored + 32 fresh). This successor restates the identical no-re-roll protocol with the artifact's counts; both records now cite ASM-0622 in place of ASM-0422. Revisit condition: none for this pair; a successor audit protocol supersedes it with its own ASM.

claim: Sizing/expectation note only, CORRECTED-COUNT SUCCESSOR of ASM-0425 (supersede-by-citation; the ASM-0425 line stands as append-only history and is no longer cited by the l3a-parse/a5-nl records): the l3a-parse primary planning value 0.95 is implausible - the audit sample measured natural-synonym phrasing on 9/28 = 0.3214 (not 9/27 = 0.333; the in-scope covered sample has 28 items per the committed r1 artifact) of in-scope covered sampled items (count-maker 4/4, part-lookup 4/4, instance-true 1/4), and against the single-label mapper lexicon (no synonym table) those items are expected to abstain, putting the covered-exact rate plausibly in or below the 463-485/527 INCONCLUSIVE band (extrapolated from a 28-item audit sample to the 527-item scored set and from judge label-use to mapper parse behaviour - neither measured end-to-end). Used ONLY to set maintainer expectations that an INCONCLUSIVE/FAIL landing is live; never a premise for any gate, re-authoring, or re-design; the re-scope keeps every synonym-phrased item scored.
resolution_path: The l3a-parse run measures the covered-exact rate and the label-verbatim vs paraphrase stratification directly; whatever it returns supersedes this band. An INCONCLUSIVE landing re-opens FK-NLB-2 with data per ASM-0141; a FAIL routes to parser investment per the frozen kill text.

claim: NLB skeptic round-2 RE-AUDIT remediation (extends ASM-0621's lawful edit set by exactly this named, diff-scoped edit set and no other; SUPERSEDES ASM-0621 item (1)'s supersede mechanics, which the re-audit proved unexecutable in a kot-log/1 log): (1) kot-log/1 gains an executable run-row retry-supersession channel - a run row may carry supersedes:[row sha256,...], row identity = sha256 of the replaced results-log line's exact bytes incl. newline (identical to prev_sha256 / reuse.row_hashes identity); log-append enforces fail-closed: run-event only, mandatory non-empty reason, no duplicate targets, every target an EXISTING exit:'ok' run row of the SAME config.arm and phase not already superseded; self/forward/cyclic references are structurally impossible (a target must already be a chain line); event:'supersede' keeps refusing exit:'ok' targets, so a success is never voided WITHOUT its replacement row, and any retry remains in-chain and auditor-visible (result-shopping is additionally detectable via gate G6 determinism). (2) Both pinned scorers' G0 re-verify the SAME semantics independently: supersedes must be a non-empty list of distinct 64-hex row hashes, targets present among scored records, same-arm, non-self; malformed forms (dict/string), cross-arm supersession, byte-duplicate rows, records without a string config.arm (the top-level arm fallback is removed), dangling targets, arms with zero survivors, and >1 surviving row per arm are all INSTRUMENT-INVALID in every log order; verdict-gen passes eligible rows (including retry-superseded ok rows) unchanged to the pinned scorer, which is the resolution point. (3) The pinned instrument emits a DIRECTLY appendable kot-log/1 run body: event 'run', exit 'ok', phase from --phase, prereg_hash auto-stamped from registry/frozen-index.json post-freeze (absent pre-freeze so log-append refuses ERR_P2_NOT_FROZEN), no undeclared top-level key (the former top-level 'arm' is removed; config.arm is the only arm declaration), and native --supersedes/--reason flags for the retry path. (4) G1/G2/G4 counts hardening in both scorers: per-family control acceptable ('ok') sums must equal the run-level n_control_refused_acceptable; run-level totals n_covered/n_control/dev_n, dev_parse_refused, and every gold-replication counter must be strict non-negative integers; dev_parse_refused <= dev_n; G4 divides only well-formed in-range counters. (5) Honesty corrections carried in the same change: the instrument docstring no longer claims a byte-identical engine (G2 behavioural claim restated), and the section-14.8 item-7 'bit-equal' complement claim is softened to the measured fact (identical gate decision at every integer count; 4/527 differs by one binary64 ULP, 9/855 bit-equal). All edits are log-schema/log-writer/scorer/instrument-envelope side; no phrasing or eval byte, endpoint, threshold, decision boundary, or planned n moves.
backing_ref: docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md section 14.9; poc/nlb-skeptic/skeptic-round2-output.txt sha256 6e60f408a4231c595832dd6b91262ef49c3617a410e5e71522ea33bb578b7773 (attacks on the dict-valued and cross-arm supersedes, zeroed control-family ok, float totals and dev_parse_refused reproduced there); analysis/l3a_parse.py + analysis/a5_nl.py --selftest fixtures on each reproduced attack; scratch-log run-to-log integration demonstration via the real tools/registry/log-append.py
rationale: The round-2 re-audit proved the registered recovery path could not exist in a real hash-chained log (kot-log/1 additionalProperties:false rejects the field; log-append's supersede event cannot target ok rows; only ok rows reach the scorer), so freezing would have pinned an unexecutable protocol where one accidental duplicate append poisons the record permanently. Making the channel real in schema+writer+scorer, with append-time AND read-time enforcement of one registered rule, converts the promise into an executable, auditable mechanism while PRESERVING the anti-re-roll invariant (a successful row is only ever replaced by an explicit, reasoned, same-arm successor in the chain). The counts hardening closes the reproduced acceptance of contradictory control-family classifications and non-integral counters. Revisit condition: any change to kot-log/1 row identity or to canonical JSON serialization must re-derive the scorer's self-contained _row_sha twin.

claim: MCP tool-definition structural-isolation ruling for blind headless claude -p judges (truthstyle-2x2 judge-p3, g3-llmproxy judge-pB, all future headless blind judges): (1) the truthstyle-2x2 p3 verdict STANDS despite the ~1% MCP tool-definition leak, because the frozen structurally-tool-less clause is enforced per-attempt by the pre-registered spec-7.1 validity predicate — every retained label came from a call whose captured init event proves tools==[], the invalidation is content-blind (evaluated before the answer field is read, so it cannot select on labels; FIRST-VALID-ANSWER-IS-FINAL preserved), no-label stayed 0 (808/808), no tool_use block ever appeared, and blinding stayed GREEN; (2) --tools '' alone is NOT a sufficient structural-isolation guarantee: the per-call init.tools==[] gate (with zero tool_use blocks, permission_denials==[], num_turns==1) is a MANDATORY hard invariant for every blind headless claude -p judge, and protocols staged after 2026-07-10 must additionally pass --strict-mcp-config (no --mcp-config) as defense-in-depth that never substitutes for the gate; --setting-sources '' is never an MCP-exclusion mechanism; (3) g3-llmproxy judge-pB already carries the gate verbatim in its pinned judge-invocation.md section 6 (sha dd402cdd4b370823f220f1fe533334648655b0cafb9decaf5b89822939d72ce8 unchanged) — no change before its run; the flag is deliberately NOT retrofitted into already-pinned harness bytes; (4) the judges-invocation.md section-4.3.1 addendum is a post-verdict working-tree-only edit — the final-phase record consumed the STAGED bytes sha 5b543f41635f4676382952bd1f6cd75daafa6f4e2186d64ed7f34de06467543d (harness-manifest.json / ops amendment seq 1); auditors recompute the harness pin against the staged bytes in git history, never the edited working tree.
backing_ref: poc/truthstyle-2x2/mcp-tool-isolation-ruling.md sha256 4713bf429445ff47b587fd5df73376d6251637d85eb93734d4c653ddba65c8d2; poc/truthstyle-2x2/judges-invocation.md post-addendum sha256 1b660062de1b9aaea67c6c2226b515cebd06090db385fbc88eb210ab6fbc38a0; poc/g3-llmproxy/judge-invocation.md section 6
rationale: The p3 re-run surfaced non-deterministic MCP tool-definition injection into fresh headless judge processes; without a per-call observable fail-closed gate, the frozen blinding/tool-less clauses would rest on a CLI flag measured to fail ~1% of calls. The gate is the only per-call-verifiable guarantee; the flag reduces exposure but its residual rate cannot be bounded by staging probes at a ~1% base rate.

claim: Leak evidence (mechanical walk over the committed p3 re-run captures, run poc/truthstyle-2x2/opus-runs/20260710T182459Z, claude-code 2.1.201, model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, subscription auth): of 818 captured init events, 8 (0.98%) reported a non-empty tools array of 8-23 claude.ai account-connector MCP tool definitions (mcp__claude_ai_* names) despite --tools '' and --setting-sources '' (positions 324, 402, 411, 421, 575, 672, 715, 804; all first content attempts); 269/818 (32.9%) showed non-empty init.mcp_servers (connectors attached, pending/connected) even where tools==[]; zero tool_use blocks in any assistant message anywhere; permission_denials [] and num_turns==1 everywhere; all 8 leaked attempts were marked content-invalid (tool_use_detected) by the runner's pre-registered init.tools==[] check and every affected item recovered on its second content attempt with init.tools==[]; final accounting 808/808 labelled, no-label 0, blinding sweep GREEN (clarified_hits []). Hardened-form probes: 3/3 staging probes of the exact section-4.3 command plus --strict-mcp-config (no --mcp-config) were accepted in -p mode and returned init.mcp_servers==[] and init.tools==[].
rationale: Raw counts recorded so the ruling's premises are re-derivable mechanically from committed bytes; the 3-probe hardened-form measurement establishes flag ACCEPTANCE and connector non-attachment only, never a residual-rate bound.

claim: Mechanism reading (not load-bearing for the verdict-stands ruling): the leak is a connector-attachment race — claude.ai account-level MCP servers attach to a large fraction of fresh headless -p sessions (269/818 measured) and, when a connector reaches connected state before the init event is emitted (~1% of calls), its tool definitions enter the session's tools array; --tools '' governs the built-in tool set and --setting-sources '' governs settings sources, neither of which covers account-level connectors; --strict-mcp-config structurally prevents connector attachment (mcp_servers==[] in all hardened probes), so it should suppress the race, but its residual leak rate is unmeasured at the ~1% base rate and is extrapolated, not proven — which is why the per-call init.tools==[] gate remains the binding invariant.
rationale: Separates the unproven causal story (timing race, flag effectiveness) from the measured facts (ASM-0645) and the binding protocol rule (ASM-0644), so no conclusion silently consumes the extrapolated part.
resolution_path: A future large-n headless-judge pass staged with --strict-mcp-config (e.g. g9/knull-line or the next truthstyle-family run) measures the residual non-empty-init.tools rate directly; 0 leaks over >=800 calls would bound the hardened rate below the observed 1% baseline.

claim: llmproxy Gate-A audit-applicability ruling (Fable interpretive ruling, 2026-07-10; binding on g9-llmproxy and m0a-llmproxy, and the default for future llmproxy stand-ins unless a design supersedes it): the house Gate-A discipline — the audit gate fires on PASS only; FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE verdicts stand MEASURED-UNAUDITED with audit.state N/A — applies to QUARANTINED weak-proxy records UNCHANGED. The ASM-0553 quarantine caps the MEANING of a proxy verdict, not its arithmetic: a proxy PASS whose numbers become the programme's provisional citables (m0a-llmproxy P/R replace the agent-judged provisionals in every artifact) requires the cross-vendor Gate-A mechanical recompute exactly as a primary PASS does, and the pending human-gold pass CANNOT discharge that function — it measures a different estimand on a different timeline and never re-verifies the estimator arithmetic. Therefore: m0a-llmproxy REQUIRES a Codex Gate-A audit before its PASS confirms (auditor family overlap with the GPT-family judge disclosed in the frozen stage_discipline; acceptable because Gate-A is byte recomputation, never judge validation); g9-llmproxy (FAIL-analog) is audit-NOT-applicable and its verdict object's audit.state N/A is correct as emitted.
backing_ref: registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json + registry/assessments/m0a-llmproxy.json (this ruling); precedent: registry/verdicts/f2.json, g7.json, g8.json (FAIL, audit N/A; policy stated at docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md 'the audit gate fires on PASS only') and registry/audits/f2b-transfer-llmproxy/1-gate-a-codex.json (a quarantined weak-proxy PASS received the mandatory Gate-A audit)
rationale: The Gate-A audit exists to stop an erroneous self-favoring verdict from licensing investment or citation; a FAIL is self-disfavoring and its pre-registered consequence (pause + escalate at proxy scope) is conservative, so auditing it adds nothing the chain/lint rails do not already give — the g8 precedent states 'the Gate-A PASS-upgrade is inapplicable to a FAIL'. A PASS whose P/R become the programme's provisional numbers is exactly the case the mechanical recompute protects: population weighting, strict/lenient duality and the Clopper-Pearson bound are the error class an independent recompute catches. Falls away per-record when each audit lands or each human pass supersedes the proxy.

claim: g9-llmproxy FAIL-analog response operationalisation (executes the frozen envelope clause 6 'pausing authoring-cost claims and escalating to the maintainer' at exactly its frozen scope): (a) no plan/prospectus/pitch document may newly cite or carry forward Fable-authoring capability or authoring-cost claims without quoting this proxy FAIL-analog and its weak-proxy envelope, pending the human g9.review; (b) authoring-pipeline SCALE-UP (bulk authoring waves beyond materials already frozen into registered experiments) is deferred pending maintainer decision; already-frozen experiments and their pinned materials are untouched; (c) the human g9.review (GATE-H, ~4h) is promoted to the authoring lane's critical path — on the identical 50 sheet bytes it simultaneously adjudicates HS-A (the only reviewer that can) and measures the human-vs-proxy severity offset that resolves ASM-0522; (d) proxy labels stay quarantined from the human reviewer per ASM-0553. Explicitly NOT enacted: no HS-A adjudication, no reversion of authoring-cost estimates in plan documents (that reversion is the consequence of the HUMAN g9 kill alone, per the frozen g9 kill text), no claim that the explications are inadequate.
backing_ref: registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json; registry/verdicts/g9-llmproxy.json (FAIL, wilson_ub_proxy 0.2850 < 0.34); frozen envelope clause 6 in registry/experiments/g9-llmproxy.json
rationale: The frozen record pre-registered the FAIL-direction response in programme terms (pause + escalate, formally scoped to the proxy id) but left its operational content to interpretation; fixing it here makes the response auditable and prevents both under-reaction (silently continuing to cite authoring capability) and over-reaction (treating a severity-uncalibrated proxy FAIL as an HS-A kill). Falls away when the human g9.review reads out.

claim: m0a-llmproxy precision-materiality ruling (Fable, 2026-07-10): proxy strict precision 0.7143 (concept 0.69 / prime 0.72), sitting 0.106 below the replaced non-blind agent provisional (0.82) with per-item mapped-strata agreement only 0.81/0.80, IS ruled materially low — the envelope's asymmetric-reading early-warning clause fires in ADVISORY form: escalate to the maintainer, and every downstream consumer of mapper outputs (E1 data builds first, which are pre-registered to publish M0a numbers before E1) must carry a declared risk line 'mapper precision possibly ~0.7 in mapped strata (WEAK-PROXY reading, pending human M0a)' wherever mapper-derived content enters a design or claim. NOT a stop: the M0a pre-registration is a measurement with no kill bar and the proxy may not invent one; the 0.106 delta is unattributable in-design between non-blind-agent leniency, GPT-family judge severity, and true mapper error (ASM-0543); the none-stratum recall floor came out clean (none-miss 0.0, CP-upper95 0.0582); and TinyStories is the pre-registered favourable case, so the risk line understates nothing by domain. The abstain-miss rise (0.36 agent -> 0.46 proxy) is carried as a recall-side coverage cost note (mapper abstains on tokens a blind judge would map), not a correctness warning.
rationale: A 0.71 point sits in the band where 'materially LOW' is the judgment call the frozen envelope deliberately left to interpretation; ruling it advisory-material makes the risk citable and binding on E1 build decisions without manufacturing the mapper-quality gate the design forbade. Resolved (attributed or retired) by the human M0a pass over the same 300 items.

claim: truthstyle-2x2 PASS consumption discipline (operative discharge of the frozen pre-declared consumer rule; binding on every downstream citation of the lifted style-leak guard): (1) f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings - f2b-transfer-llmproxy A_1p=0.95 included - may henceforth be cited WITHOUT a mandatory style-bias band, at exactly the frozen scope and no wider: the pinned 3-LLM judge pool (GPT-5.6-Sol, GPT-5.5, Claude-Haiku-4.5), S1 fit+identification standards WITH the S6 register-immunity instruction, single-stimulus yes/no/cannot-say acceptance format read onto the f2b MCQ/claim formats ONLY via the ASM-0045 FORK-4 stipulation, TOST margin +/-0.10 absolute; (2) every citation of the lift must restate 'style-robust AT MARGIN 0.10 for this pool/format' and must never render the PASS as 'zero style effect' - the measured pooled effect is NONZERO (0.025, 90% bootstrap interval [0.0033, 0.0467], excluding 0, NSM-favoring); (3) no per-cell or per-judge equivalence may be cited beyond the Holm-certified members: the judge-p1 TOST PASSED (point 0.01, protecting the A_1p family specifically), the truth-CORRECT-cell TOST did NOT pass Holm (point 0.05, p 0.0375 vs Holm-adjusted 0.025) so correct-cell equivalence is uncertified, and the truth-wrong-cell inflation test is a favorable non-rejection (point 0.0, p 1.0), never a certified bound; (4) any consumer needing a margin tighter than 0.10 (FORK-5), an MCQ-format-MEASURED bound beyond the ASM-0045 stipulation, a HUMAN-judge bound (ASM-0047 stands untouched), other style transforms, other concepts/corpora, or any coverage-general claim re-raises the guard for that consumer - in particular, the measured interval happening to lie inside +/-0.05 licenses NOTHING tighter than 0.10 without a pre-registered FORK-5 successor.
backing_ref: registry/verdicts/truthstyle-2x2.json (kill_criterion_verbatim clause b: 'style-robust at margin 0.10 for THIS pool/format; the style-leak guard is lifted at that margin and no further'; style_effect 0.025, CI [0.0033,0.0467]); registry/audits/truthstyle-2x2/1-gate-a-codex.json (CONFIRMED); reports/auto/truthstyle-2x2/analysis-output.json sha256 0227c8b7938b49108405983ab7e0f6833afe3f6c28a38233fdf843aa431346bf (holm members); registry/assessments/truthstyle-2x2.json
rationale: The frozen consumer rule pre-declares THAT only a PASS lifts the guard; HOW the lifted guard may be cited is an interpretive choice, stipulated here so downstream records cannot silently widen the license. The known failure mode of equivalence verdicts is rounding 'bounded at 0.10' to 'no style effect'; clause 2 forbids it mechanically, and clause 3 prevents the pooled certificate from being quietly re-attached to the uncertified correct cell - the cell most rhetorically tempting for endorsement readings of correct-labelled content.

claim: Direction reading of the measured nonzero truthstyle-2x2 style effect (interpretive colour, never a premise): the pooled +0.025 (interval excluding 0) and the per-judge points (p1 0.01, p2 0.02, p3 0.045) are read as a real but small NSM-register acceptance preference in current LLM judges, direction-consistent with the ASM-0021/ASM-0552 tradition-familiarity plausibility argument - but for the SURFACE-REGISTER component only: within each evaluable pair the content is matched and truth is matched, so the probe bounds the register/style channel and says nothing about judge familiarity with NSM canonical CONTENT (content is constant within pairs by construction). The concentration of the effect in the truth-correct cell (point 0.05 vs wrong-cell 0.0) is read as the register preference expressing itself only where the content already fits the headword. Not load-bearing anywhere: the guard-lift rests solely on the certified TOST bound, and this reading adds no license.
rationale: Separates the measured bound (verdict) from the unproven causal colour (this line), so no downstream text silently consumes the direction story as if it were measured mechanism.
resolution_path: (a) the ASM-0047 post-Stage-1 human style rider on fresh items measures the human analogue of the register preference; (b) a pre-registered FORK-5 successor at margin 0.05, or an MCQ-format successor cell per ASM-0045's resolution path, would re-measure the LLM register effect; (c) the human-vs-proxy delta on f2b-transfer Stage-1 identical items (ASM-0021's registered path) measures the combined familiarity channel - including the content-familiarity component this probe deliberately holds constant.

claim: g3-llmproxy-v2 pass-B output-handling robustness fix (the ONLY delta from the superseded frozen g3-llmproxy, frozen_sha256 a50710609fe41d2b2b185400f95ee31594ef49f5575b331c1976f923b531c2b8, whose run ABORTED 2026-07-10 on the section-7 >10-no-label gate: judge-pB, claude-haiku-4-5 headless, systematically wrapped its two-field pass-B answer object in a ```json markdown code fence on 24/26 attempted real pass-B items while the pinned section-5 contract accepted only a bare JSON object; judge-pA server-side output schema unaffected, pass-A 200/200 labelled for both judges; the model's own preflight calibration answers were unfenced, so a model-side calibration item cannot exercise the defect): (1) the judge-pB pass-B format-only system prompt (poc/g3-llmproxy-v2/judge-pB-system-prompt-pass-b.txt) now explicitly requires a bare raw {...} object starting with { and ending with } - no markdown code fence, no ``` characters, no language tag, no prose; (2) the section-5 extraction contract gains a uniform content-blind FENCE NORMALIZATION applied to the raw answer string of both judges, all passes and probes, BEFORE json parsing: strip ASCII whitespace, and iff the string both starts and ends with ``` remove exactly one fence layer (opening ``` + optional [A-Za-z0-9_-]{0,16} language tag + optional spaces/tabs + the first newline when present, and the closing ```), re-strip, single layer only, then json.loads over the entire remaining string to exactly one JSON object; the reference implementation is extract_answer_object/normalize_token in the pinned analysis/g3_llmproxy_v2.py and the runner MUST label through it (a reimplementation is a spec violation); (3) preflight adds the runner-local fenced-extraction self-check cal:g3lp-x1 (python3 analysis/g3_llmproxy_v2.py --selftest, whose pinned fixtures include the aborted run's exact fenced pass-B bytes) as a precondition of both judges' preflight_pass, before any judge call. Fence normalization is FORMAT normalization in the same class as the existing whitespace/trailing-period token normalization: deterministic, evaluated before any answer field is read, unable to change which label is extracted - never answer repair; first-valid-answer-final and the <=3-content-attempt/no-label accounting are unchanged. The estimand, design, brackets, gates, verdict rules, budget and blinding are byte-carried from the superseded record; this is an extraction-contract robustness change only and does not affect the estimand.
backing_ref: poc/g3-llmproxy/opus-runs/20260710T194903Z/judge-pB-haiku45/run-log.txt (parse_fail captures); registry/experiments/g3-llmproxy-v2.json; poc/g3-llmproxy-v2/judge-invocation.md sections 5/8; analysis/g3_llmproxy_v2.py (extraction fixtures)
rationale: The fenced answers were systematic and content-complete - the object inside the fence was well-formed with plausible labels - so rejecting them measures CLI output-formatting behaviour, not the annotation instrument the record exists to measure. Belt-and-suspenders (the prompt forbids the fence AND the extraction tolerates one layer if the model adds it anyway) makes pass-B robust in both directions without touching what is measured, and the runner-local fixture check proves the tolerance before any spend, which the v1 model-side calibration provably could not.

claim: g3-llmproxy-v2 supersession + custody mechanics: (1) g3-llmproxy-v2 SUPERSEDES g3-llmproxy via the record's supersedes field; the v1 record stays FROZEN as immutable history (frozen-index entry untouched), is never run, and its PINNED-AT-INPUTS g3-annot-llmproxy corpus placeholder is deliberately left unfilled - no ops amendment may ever complete it; (2) v2 outputs land in the DISJOINT corpus data/g3-annot-llmproxy-v2/ (filled by ops amendment on the v2 record) and provenance in poc/g3-llmproxy-v2/opus-runs/, so no byte the v1 record pinned is ever mutated and no v2 output byte is attributable to v1; the v2 run writes NOTHING under poc/g3-llmproxy/ or data/g3-annot-llmproxy/; (3) unchanged artifacts are carried by their existing v1 paths + sha256 pins (poc/g3-llmproxy/ templates, schemas, pass-A system prompt, probe set + manifest + builder, calibration items; data/instance-descriptions/; analysis/g3.py reference) - shared pinned bytes, retained read-only; only the pass-B system prompt, the judge-invocation spec, the analysis script and the prereg doc carry fresh v2 paths + pins; (4) all governing stipulations of the superseded record carry over verbatim (ASM-0530-0534, ASM-0550-0554, ASM-0642, and ASM-0644 including the mandatory per-call init.tools==[] hard gate with zero tool_use blocks, permission_denials==[] and num_turns==1); the v2 spec is staged 2026-07-10, so ASM-0644's after-2026-07-10 --strict-mcp-config clause is not triggered and the judge invocation bytes stay identical to v1; (5) the aborted v1 run's provenance (poc/g3-llmproxy/opus-runs/20260710T194903Z/) is retained read-only as the defect evidence; its labels and captures are QUARANTINED - nothing is reused (no reused_from; the v1 run logged no results-log rows) and v2 re-runs both judges' both passes in full from preflight.
backing_ref: registry/experiments/g3-llmproxy-v2.json (supersedes field); registry/experiments/g3-llmproxy.json frozen_sha256 a50710609fe41d2b2b185400f95ee31594ef49f5575b331c1976f923b531c2b8; registry/frozen-index.json; poc/g3-llmproxy-v2/judge-invocation.md sections 0/9
rationale: Frozen records are immutable (P2 section 1.1): a defect in a frozen-but-unrunnable harness is corrected by a fresh superseding id that re-pins only the changed bytes, keeps every unchanged byte at its already-pinned path, and keeps output trees disjoint so provenance attribution stays unambiguous between the aborted v1 evidence and the v2 re-run.

claim: NLB skeptic round-3 remediation (extends the ASM-0621/ASM-0624 lawful edit set by exactly this named, diff-scoped edit set and no other; design doc 14.10 items A+B): (1) G0 COMPLETED - both pinned scorers re-validate the FULL append-time retry-supersession semantics that are order-independently checkable at read time: a run row carrying supersedes must state a non-blank string reason (missing_reason detail), and no target may be retired twice, the order-free form of log-append's not-already-superseded rule (retired_twice detail); both INSTRUMENT-INVALID in every log order. The registered 'two independent enforcements of one registered rule' defence-in-depth claim is thereby made TRUE rather than downgraded (resolution (a) of the round-3 finding-1 options). Target event/exit/phase remain enforced TRANSITIVELY and are registered as such: verdict-gen's eligibility filter drops non-run/non-final/non-ok rows before the scorer, leaving any reference to them dangling (already G0-invalid). (2) G1 SHORT-CIRCUIT - any g1_counts failure returns immediately after the gate block with instrument_valid false, an EMPTY analysis block, valid-JSON stdout and exit 0, so verdict-gen's frozen rule 0 fires the registered INSTRUMENT-INVALID and no rejected denominator (boolean/float/negative/missing) ever reaches Wilson/Holm/descriptive arithmetic (previously n_control=True crashed both scorers into ERR_P2_ANALYSIS and a5 n_covered=True emitted unserializable complex Wilson values). (3) G1 additionally types every remaining analysis-divided counter (label_strata, synonym-probe counters, frontend_total_ns when present; in-range non-negative integers, bool excluded) and non-dict metrics/pins_observed bodies on any arm are handled fail-closed, never as exceptions. (4) Fixture-side only: Holm-boundary fixtures now construct an internally consistent control split (non-acceptable remainder deducted from by_family ok). All edits are scorer-side; no phrasing or eval byte, instrument sha, endpoint, threshold, decision boundary, or planned n moves.
backing_ref: docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md section 14.10; poc/nlb-skeptic/skeptic-round3-output.txt sha256 5d1867482fab9065233936d8080b36b251116040cea93707f57604c922babdde (missing/blank-reason and double-retirement acceptance plus the boolean-total crash paths reproduced there); analysis/l3a_parse.py sha256 d6b3e65e6206cd781713f54c529c4b70bf6e72141e741704011f341a80901ce6 + analysis/a5_nl.py sha256 4ea2383cc8c75c8d32a50c8229fe13550a478847906f80ddb07e9d0827cde018 --selftest fixtures on each reproduced attack
rationale: The round-3 re-audit proved two claim-vs-implementation gaps inside already-registered items: the scorer-side defence-in-depth claim of ASM-0624 item (2) enumerated fewer checks than the append path enforces (an overclaim reachable from a manually constructed, schema-valid chain), and the ASM-0624 item (4) counts promise classified malformed counts INSTRUMENT-INVALID only when the scorer survived to say so (boolean denominators crashed it into ERR_P2_ANALYSIS instead). Making the scorer re-validate reason + single-retirement makes the registered independence claim true at trivial cost; short-circuiting on G1 failure makes the registered verdict classification mechanically reachable on every malformed-count input. Revisit condition: any change to kot-log/1 supersession semantics or to the analysis-consumed metric surface must update G0/G1 in both scorers in the same change.

claim: Freeze-tool pause-scan supersession resolution (design doc 14.10 item C): prereg-freeze.py scan_open_extrapolations resolves the register's supersede-by-citation convention mechanically - a current register entry whose claim carries the marker 'SUCCESSOR of ASM-NNNN (supersede-by-citation' retires the named predecessor from the live scan, and any citation of the predecessor (record bytes or pinned prereg doc, including supersession/historical prose) is followed along the supersession chain, cycle-safe, to its live end; the live entry is flagged iff it is itself an open EXTRAPOLATION. A historically-cited-but-superseded ASM therefore emits no live pause flag; on the l3a-parse/a5-nl records the flag set becomes exactly ASM-0623. PAUSE remains non-fatal either way (stop false conclusions, not experiments).
backing_ref: tools/registry/prereg-freeze.py (ASM_SUPERSEDED_RE + scan_open_extrapolations); docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md section 14.10 item C; registry/assumptions.jsonl ASM-0622/ASM-0623 (the marker's first uses, per section 14.9 item D); poc/nlb-skeptic/skeptic-round3-output.txt sha256 5d1867482fab9065233936d8080b36b251116040cea93707f57604c922babdde
rationale: The round-3 re-audit showed the dry-run pause flag for the superseded ASM-0425 contradicted the 14.9 item-D remediation claim that no live citation reaches the stale entry: the scanner treated every ASM token in the pinned doc as a live citation, including the supersession prose itself. Following the register's own supersede-by-citation marker keeps the register append-only, keeps historical prose intact, and makes the backlog signal point at the entry a resolution would actually retire (the successor), instead of a line nothing live rests on. Revisit condition: if the register ever gains a first-class machine-readable supersession field, the prose-marker recognition should be superseded by it in the same change.

claim: knull plain-arm quality confound RULING (designer epistemic call, 2026-07-10): the blind GPT-5.6 naturalness read of the authored plain-dictionary store (3/10; mechanical semicolon-chain template, anaphoric renaming 'the item/the object/the creature', staged observers, consequence/life-lesson closings, register violations) is ruled a ONE-SIDED confound of the knull ablation. It leaves the deflationary readings interpretable (TOST equivalence or kernel-inferiority against even a degraded aligned control still demonstrates store-content genericity a fortiori), but it makes H-KN2 / PASS-CONTENT UNLICENSABLE as authored: a kernel win over a mechanically defective non-NSM control cannot be attributed to NSM content rather than to control quality, and the defect's bias direction (weakening the comparator) runs TOWARD the content claim - the exact anti-conservative direction the design forbids (design doc section 5 attack 5 conservatism principle). CONSEQUENCE: re-authoring the FULL plain store to the maintainer's lexicographic standard (scholar's register, most-apt word, only what defines the term, no anaphoric templating, no extraneous content), gated blind per ASM-0701, is a REQUIRED precondition of the knull GPU campaign - not optional polish; the frozen record's plain-store pins must be superseded/amended and gates G-1/G-2/G-3 re-run before any spend. The maintainer's language-quality standard (2026-07-10) is adopted as a hard requirement on all authored ordinary-English definitional content.
backing_ref: poc/knull/gpt56-plaindict-review/review.raw.md (blind read, headwords withheld, no project context); registry/experiments/knull.json frozen_sha256 9b2065c6f18797f0754097155893f499330eca1f84cf92272836050e2b0266bb; docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md
rationale: The knull design already commits to conservatism AGAINST PASS-CONTENT wherever a bias is irreducible (best-comparator selection, attack 5). A low-quality plain control is a bias in the opposite direction on the same comparator seam: it can only weaken the aligned non-NSM arm. Ruling it in-scope-fatal for PASS-CONTENT and out-of-scope-harmless for PASS-GENERIC follows the bias direction exactly. Re-authoring is required rather than statistical correction because no gate in the frozen record measures prose quality, so the confound is unbounded by any pre-registered instrument.
resolution_path: re-authored full plain store passes the ASM-0701 blind naturalness gate + G-1/G-2/G-3 re-run + superseding knull record frozen (maintainer-reviewed plan: docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md section 7)

claim: knull plain-store blind naturalness-gate operationalization (the quality instrument for ASM-0700, sample AND full-rewrite): blindness = headwords withheld, definition texts only, no project/NSM/experiment context, judge never told a comparison set exists; judge = GPT-5.6 (codex-cli 0.144.1 exec, read-only sandbox, ephemeral, empty out-of-repo workdir, reasoning effort high) - the SAME instrument, rubric and prompt frame as the 3/10 baseline read; scoring = the rubric's (a) overall-naturalness 1-10; PASS iff the re-authored set scores >= 7/10 at a set size matched to a paired re-score of the pre-rewrite definitions run in an independent session (the control that removes set-size artifacts). Sample-gate artifacts: poc/knull/reauthor-sample/ (prompts, raw judge outputs, check-report). Full-store gate before re-freeze additionally requires a second judge family (Claude Haiku via the pinned headless claude -p form of poc/truthstyle-2x2/judges-invocation.md section 4.3 incl. the 4.3.1 strict-mcp-config addendum) with both judges >= 7/10, and the gate result is recorded in the superseding record's prefreeze evidence.
backing_ref: poc/knull/gpt56-plaindict-review/ (baseline instrument); poc/knull/reauthor-sample/ (sample gate); poc/truthstyle-2x2/judges-invocation.md (pinned blind-judge mechanics)
rationale: Naturalness has no mechanical linter; the fairest measure of improvement is the same blind instrument that detected the defect, at matched set size, with the old set re-scored as a paired control. Threshold 7/10 clears the measured mechanical band (3/10) decisively while not demanding indistinguishability from print (10/10), which the frozen token-band constraint (L-3 word band vs NSM glosses of 16-56 words) makes unreachable for short-sense words. Two judge families on the full store guard against single-judge idiosyncrasy at the point where the result becomes a freeze precondition.
resolution_path: full-store gate run recorded with the superseding knull record's G-1 evidence

claim: Programme scope RULING on definitional-output register (the maintainer's deeper question 'is this what the system produces?'): (1) kernel-v0 glosses and molecules-v0 grounding notes are NSM controlled language BY DESIGN - a formal interlingua, not defective English - and are exempt from the ordinary-English lexicographic standard AS STORE CONTENT; (2) HOWEVER, on every current end-task surface (f2b, knull, d-qa, d-qa-r) the text presented as the correct definitional answer IS the NSM-register string verbatim (def-match correct option = canonical gloss; claim items = gloss segments), so the system as currently evaluated produces NSM-register definitional output, NOT scholarly English; (3) no surface-realization layer (NSM record -> edited ordinary-English definition) exists anywhere in the programme, no experiment measures one, and NO existing verdict licenses any claim that the system 'produces well-formed English definitions'; any future user-facing definitional output in ordinary English falls under the maintainer's hard standard and requires such a layer plus a quality gate of the ASM-0701 form; (4) the knull OPAQUE store is deliberately meaningless nonce text (semantic-empty control) and is out of scope for prose-quality standards; (5) rule-generated instrument text (d-ts style variants, templated QA stems) is instrument machinery, not definitional output, and is judged by its measurement function, not by prose standards.
backing_ref: docs/design-knull-content-injection-ablation.md section 1 (I-1, A-1..A-4: gloss bytes are the item surfaces and the accept strings); data/kernel-v0/concepts/*.json + data/molecules-v0/molecules/*.json (the NSM-register content); docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md section 6
rationale: The scholar standard binds prose that purports to be ordinary English. NSM explications purport the opposite - a controlled semantic metalanguage - so applying the standard to them would be a category error; but the distinction must be registered precisely so the correctness-thesis narrative never silently equates 'kernel-verified answer' with 'well-written definition', and so the missing surface-realization layer is a named, visible gap rather than an implicit assumption.
resolution_path: if/when a surface-realization layer is designed, its output quality gets its own gated experiment; until then the gap is disclosed in programme narration

claim: knull plain-store naturalness-gate AMENDMENT PROPOSAL (post-measurement; takes effect ONLY on maintainer ratification - registered, not adopted): the ASM-0701 pass rule '>= 7/10 overall naturalness' is proposed to be superseded by a two-part rule that separates the maintainer's actual standard from an instrument artifact - (1) ZERO defect-class findings from the blind judge, where the defect classes are the maintainer's verbatim standard operationalized: register violation, improper/inapt word choice, unnecessary/non-definitional information (consequence narration, staged observers, anaphoric renaming 'the item/the object/the creature', life-lesson/literary closings); AND (2) an overall-naturalness FLOOR of >= 5/10 at matched set size, both judge families. Rationale for the split: the frozen matching contract (L-3 word band vs 16-56-word NSM glosses; L-4 >=2 segments per entry) forces every plain entry to ~2x natural dictionary length and a fixed two-part shape, so the blind rubric's 10-anchor ('indistinguishable from a professionally edited general dictionary') and hence any >=7 threshold is structurally unreachable for ANY authoring under matched budgets, independent of word-aptness or propriety. The sample gate under the OLD 7/10 rule is recorded FAIL (v3 5/10); the maintainer chooses among: ratify this amendment; relax the matching constraints (buys naturalness, costs the FLOPs-parity instrument + a redesign); or keep 7/10 (leaves PASS-CONTENT unlicensable per ASM-0700, deflationary-only run).
rationale: A gate whose ceiling is set by a frozen budget constraint, not by the quality being judged, cannot fairly gate that quality; splitting the rule isolates the maintainer's real standard (zero defect-class findings, which v3 already meets on the judge's own per-finding evidence) from the length/shape artifact (a naturalness floor). Proposing rather than adopting keeps the threshold change out of the designer's hands - a post-hoc gate loosening by the party being graded is exactly the move the conservatism discipline forbids, so ratification is reserved to the maintainer.
resolution_path: maintainer ratifies, amends, or rejects the split at review of docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md; the ratified rule is pinned in the superseding knull record's prefreeze evidence

claim: NL-boundary consumption discipline (operative discharge of the frozen kill routing for the l3a-parse / a5-nl FAIL pair; binding on every downstream citation of the deterministic NL front-end). MEASURED basis: the ONE pinned deterministic training-free front-end (mapper a1-hybrid policy sha e13dc838 + entity/identifier gazetteer + closed frame layer) is non-viable at the frozen 0.90 covered-exactness retention bar on BOTH NL-boundary verticals (l3a-parse 251/527 = 0.476, Wilson UB 0.512; a5-nl 356/855 = 0.416, Wilson UB 0.444), and on the CODE vertical it additionally breaks the fail-closed contract (a5-nl S2 dangerous-wrong KILL fired: covered wrong 43/855, Wilson LB 0.0394 >= 0.02), whereas on the FAMILY/WORLD vertical the fail-closed contract holds on the dangerous direction (l3a-parse S2 KILL absent: 8/527, LB 0.0086 < 0.02). Discipline: (1) no plan / prospectus / pitch / prereg premise may cite the deterministic a1-hybrid front-end as a working NL-to-kernel boundary at any bar at or above the tested 0.90 on either vertical; (2) the pre-declared parser-investment successor (FK-NLB-3: an LLM-assisted parser, or a deterministic synonym/frame-direction repair under a new record id) carries the re-entry per vertical, never more GPU (frozen kill routing verbatim); (3) the a5-nl fail-closed break is a binding SAFETY caveat for the code vertical specifically - a deterministic front-end on the code vertical emits confident wrong answers with provenance attached (frame ROLE_DIR orientation flips in contained-in / where-defined), so no code-vertical NL deployment or usefulness claim may rest on the front-end's fail-closed contract until a successor re-clears BOTH the exactness bar and the S2 gate; the a5-llm engine-vs-LLM PASS (formal gold-parsed inputs) is not retracted but its deployment/differentiator reading inherits this measured NL-boundary FAIL; (4) each FAIL binds ONLY its own vertical at its frozen slice (l3a family/world n=527 7-family shape-recoverable slice; a5 code n=855) - NO cross-vertical conjunction, and the per-vertical fail-closed outcomes (l3a safe, a5 dangerous) must never be pooled. This discipline restates and consumes MEASURED verdicts within their frozen scope; no generalization beyond scope is asserted.
rationale: Mirrors the g9-llmproxy (ASM-0648) and truthstyle-2x2 (ASM-0680) consumption-discipline precedents: a scoped-but-decisive FAIL must be prevented from being silently dropped or, worse, cited as a non-result. Overclaiming a working (or safe) deterministic NL boundary from a double FAIL would be worse than pausing the claim; the frozen kill text already routes the consequence to parser investment, and the a5 fail-closed break makes the safety pause non-optional on the code vertical. The register carries the honest binding so the capstone synthesis and every consumer read the pair at exactly its frozen scope.
resolution_path: The FK-NLB-3 parser successors (LLM-assisted parse and/or deterministic frame-direction / synonym repair, per vertical, new record ids) re-measure the 0.90 retention bar and the S2 fail-closed gate; whatever they return supersedes clauses (1)-(3) at their own scope. A successor PASS lifts the pause for that vertical and front-end class only.

claim: Cross-experiment boundary-pattern reading (interpretive colour for the capstone synthesis; never a premise, load-bearing for nothing). The programme's measured correctness evidence is consistent with a single pattern: the kernel's deterministic machinery is sound ON ITS OWN CLOSED GRAMMAR / self-authored substrate - l3a-parse & a5-nl gold-replication identical (527/527 and 855/855 in-run, G2), g8 F/B round-trip 33/33 with live F-verification, parent engine exactness 100% on gold - but does NOT survive measured boundaries into real or natural input, on four distinct boundaries: (i) the natural-language input boundary (l3a-parse 47.6% / a5-nl 41.6%, both FAIL the 0.90 bar, a5-nl also breaking fail-closed); (ii) the wild-formal-content boundary (g8 fragment 0/1000 random Mathlib at kernel size 39, FAIL, cross-vendor CONFIRMED); (iii) the model-internal-computation boundary (nsk1 flagship INCONCLUSIVE - internal channel delivers at echo grade, integration into free generation unresolved at-or-below the content-free null); (iv) the compute-matched verifier-offload boundary (f2 FAIL - kernel-verifier arm did not dominate the text null / gloss-self-verify at matched budget). g7 is a formalism-capacity design selection (kot-ast/2), not a boundary result; g9-llmproxy is an early-warning FAIL-analog (authoring lane, claims paused); the one neighbouring PASS, truthstyle-2x2, is an INSTRUMENT-adequacy result (LLM-judge endorsement not materially style-leaky at margin 0.10) that makes other readings trustworthy, not a kernel-content win. The NL-boundary pair adds a reachability axis on top of the coverage axis (g8/m0b/compression-census measure whether the kernel CONTAINS the target; l3a-parse/a5-nl measure that even content the kernel DOES contain and CAN decide perfectly under gold parse is not reliably ADDRESSABLE from natural language through the pinned deterministic front-end). This is a DIRECTION reading over heterogeneous experiments with DISJOINT envelopes; it is NOT a measured cross-experiment quantity, aggregates nothing, and may never serve as a premise, prereg motivation-as-fact, or pitch claim.
backing_ref: registry/verdicts/l3a-parse.json + registry/verdicts/a5-nl.json + registry/verdicts/g8.json + registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json + registry/verdicts/f2.json + registry/assessments/truthstyle-2x2.json (each figure index-bound to its own verdict's envelope)
resolution_path: Each boundary has its own pre-registered successor: FK-NLB-3 LLM-assisted / deterministic-repair parsers (NL boundary, per vertical); g8 bulk-authoring regression + ntp-toolkit definiens leg (coverage/formal boundary); nsk1 integration successors (model-internal boundary); f2 successors (verifier-offload boundary). The pattern is confirmed or broken ONLY by those successors landing, never by aggregating the current heterogeneous negatives.

claim: g3-llmproxy-v3 section-6 blinding-scan scope amendment (the ratified truthstyle-2x2 Amendment-A1 rule, ASM-0660, reused in its exact form): on the two HARNESS-CAPTURED surfaces events.jsonl and stderr.log - NEVER on user-prompt.txt - a case-insensitive blind-token match (kernel/nsm/necessity/sufficiency/hypothesis) is excluded from being a HIT iff, in the original pre-lowercase bytes, it lies wholly inside the base62 TAIL of a maximal Anthropic-format vendor identifier literal (req|msg)_[0-9A-Za-z]{20,48} with lowercase-exact prefix and non-word-adjacent boundaries (runs longer than 48 fail maximality - fail-closed); uniform over all five tokens; every byte outside qualifying tails scans byte-identically to the superseded v2 contract; ADDITIONALLY the section-5 RAW answer string (judge-emitted bytes) is re-scanned with ZERO exclusions (answer-surface strictness), so a real leak in item bytes or judge-emitted answer text still ABORTS. Reference implementation blinding_scan/_vendor_id_tail_spans/answer_blinding_hit in the pinned analysis/g3_llmproxy_v3.py (adapted from the A1 section-9.5 normative code; no g3 token is hex-embeddable, so the truthstyle hex-run branch has no analogue); the runner imports it, never reimplements; the section-8 preflight selftest proves the EXACT v2-abort bytes excluded and real-leak shapes still aborting. Motivation (measured): the v2 run 20260710T204828Z aborted on pass-A item g3-friend-07 when the pinned v2 whole-file grep hit nsM inside the harness-stamped request_id req_011Ccu3G1KQZ8ciX3SvEfnsM at events.jsonl offset 2242 - user-prompt clean, stderr empty, answer clean, judge never saw the token; every captured judge-pB attempt carries exactly two such 24-char-tail ids (judge-pA/codex: zero), so a perfectly blind 430-call judge-pB run expects ~0.6 coincidental nsm hits and the unamended scan aborts a clean run with probability ~0.5 under the null - a control firing on vendor machinery under the null detects nothing.
backing_ref: registry/corrections/truthstyle-2x2/4-blinding-audit-amendment-a1.json (ratified A1 rule, ASM-0660); poc/truthstyle-2x2/blinding-audit-clarification.md section 9; poc/g3-llmproxy-v2/opus-runs/20260710T204828Z/judge-pB-haiku45/run-log.txt and passA/g3-friend-07/c1_t0/events.jsonl (the measured false positive); analysis/g3_llmproxy_v3.py --selftest (fixtures incl. the verbatim abort-byte slice)
rationale: Base62 vendor-id tails can spell any pinned token by arithmetic coincidence (the A1 section-9.2 argument, byte-for-byte the same channel: two ids per captured judge-pB call, 22 windows x (2/62)^3 per id), so the unamended predicate fires with ~coin-flip probability per clean run and has no discriminative power on this channel; the exclusion is format-anchored, maximality-checked, fail-closed and surface-restricted, so item contamination and judge echoes fire byte-identically to v2, and the added zero-exclusion answer-surface scan closes the residual-risk shape A1 section-9.6 could only disclose, at zero false-positive cost (the valid answer grammar contains no base62 ids). Amending the scan scope preserves the control; scrubbing provenance or dropping surfaces would not.
resolution_path: any v3-scan hit at run time is a boundary stop back to Fable (never a runner improvisation); any future vendor id format outside the (req|msg)_ 20-48-base62 shape that coincidentally spells a token will abort again and is its own boundary stop

claim: g3-llmproxy-v3 custody + supersession: v3 supersedes g3-llmproxy-v2 (frozen_sha256 5c8002b3b52d0641b28ca4aee7ab243a78cca40f111264a043253da1f33cb885) after its section-6 blinding FALSE-POSITIVE abort; the fix is blinding-scan-scope ONLY (ASM-0740), carried on TOP of v2's fence fix - the v2 fence-hardened pass-B system prompt is carried byte-identical at its v2 path+pin (poc/g3-llmproxy-v2/judge-pB-system-prompt-pass-b.txt, d0672138...), the section-5 fence-normalization extraction (ASM-0650) and all v2 design/estimand/bracket/gate/verdict/budget bytes carry forward verbatim; only the judge-invocation spec, the analysis script and the prereg doc get fresh v3 paths+pins; outputs land in the DISJOINT corpus data/g3-annot-llmproxy-v3 and provenance in poc/g3-llmproxy-v3/opus-runs; the superseded records' g3-annot-llmproxy and g3-annot-llmproxy-v2 placeholders stay unfilled forever; NOTHING from the aborted v2 run is reused (full re-run, both judges, both passes, from preflight); the aborted run's provenance is retained byte-verbatim read-only as defect evidence and the g3-friend-07 request_id bytes are NOT scrubbed (under ASM-0740 they are a listed, auditor-inspectable vendor-id exclusion; the v3-form sweep over all 131 retained v2 attempts is GREEN: strict scan exactly the one g3-friend-07 hit, amended scan zero hits). Disclosure (no selection effect): no v2 label file was ever assembled or written (responses are written only at pass END and no pass ended); the runner log displayed per-item q1 fields for the ~40 processed pass-A items and the coordinator read the abort context (one request_id literal) during diagnosis; those void partials are discarded and enter no statistic; the re-run criterion (detector false positive on machinery metadata) is structural, not outcome-dependent; first-valid-answer-final bars outcome-conditioned re-rolls.
backing_ref: registry/experiments/g3-llmproxy-v2.json (frozen, immutable); poc/g3-llmproxy-v2/opus-runs/20260710T204828Z/ (retained provenance, 131 attempt captures); registry/corrections/truthstyle-2x2/4-blinding-audit-amendment-a1.json (the A1 no-scrub + re-derivability precedent, section 9.7 shape)
rationale: Frozen records are immutable, so a defect in a pinned control is a fresh superseding id (the ASM-0650/0651 v1-to-v2 precedent applied a second time); retaining the aborted bytes unscrubbed preserves auditor re-derivability - the strict v2-form scan, and the amended v3-form scan can each be independently re-run over the SAME retained bytes and must disagree in exactly the one measured place; a disjoint output corpus keeps the superseded placeholders unfilled and the eventual human round uncontaminated.
resolution_path: discharged when the g3-llmproxy-v3 record freezes with these custody bytes and the v3 run completes (or the record is itself superseded)

claim: Capstone feasibility verdicts (Fable, 2026-07-11; the programme-completion-loop 'Done' conclusion, docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md). CORRECTNESS thesis = INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING (a) an NL-reaching parser FK-NLB-3 and (b) the semantics core (g2 Pi-soundness vs blind human gold, g3 necessity), within SCOPE {kernel-v0/molecules-v0 instance, R0-1.7B hosts, family/world + code verticals, the one pinned a1-hybrid deterministic front-end, self-authored covered slice}; the instrument sub-claim (a sound, fail-closed, provenance-carrying, microsecond deterministic checker EXISTS and ports across verticals with a byte-identical engine) is FEASIBLE-and-DEMONSTRATED but INSTRUMENT-ONLY, and every MEASURED crossing into real/natural input is negative so far (l3a-parse FAIL safe, a5-nl FAIL dangerous, g8 FAIL, nsk1 INCONCLUSIVE); CONFIDENCE high on instrument + current-build boundary negatives, thesis-level INCONCLUSIVE because the two decisive legs are unrun not failed. EFFICIENCY thesis = INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING (a) de-confounding the one end-task positive (knull K-NULL aligned-non-NSM ablation OR human f2b-transfer Stage-1), (b) mint-cost (A-F0 key-gated unrun), (c) the A-E2 consumption channel (K-A3/K-A4 unmeasured), within SCOPE {<=1.7B hosts, self-authored covered/formal slice, one PRM size class, 10k-concept census anchor}; a real audited verifier-offload SIGN exists on FORMAL inputs (f2b-replicate +0.1507 at ~10% FLOPs) but is correct-ALIGNMENT-specific not shown kernel-content-specific, and the A-E2 compression figure is a MEMBERSHIP UPPER BOUND never achievable savings; CONFIDENCE high on all three. Neither thesis is dead; neither is established.
rationale: The GOAL deliverable is a defensible per-thesis feasibility verdict within honest envelopes; both resolve to INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING because the decisive legs (semantics core; the de-confound of the one positive) are unrun and human/input/key-blocked, while the measured evidence is strong on the instrument half and on the boundary negatives.
resolution_path: CORRECTNESS resolves when FK-NLB-3 (NL boundary) and g2/g3 (semantics core, human-gold gated) read out; EFFICIENCY resolves when the knull K-NULL ablation (after its plain-control rewrite) or human f2b-transfer Stage-1 de-confounds the +0.1507, and A-F0 + an A-E2 consumption measurement price the compression side.

claim: In-flight-item non-deferral ruling (Fable, 2026-07-11): the capstone synthesis is authored as the DEFINITIVE STANDING verdict now, not deferred for any in-flight item. The two in-flight items are (i) g3-llmproxy-v3 (DRAFT proxy re-run, blinding-scan fix) which is a WEAK proxy that by construction can neither fire nor discharge the frozen g3's own necessity kill, hence refine-only; and (ii) the knull plain-arm rewrite (control-quality repair on a maintainer-ratified split gate) which produces NO verdict (the knull ABLATION itself is unrun). The genuinely verdict-moving items (g2, human f2b-transfer Stage-1, the knull ablation, human g9) are all UNRUN and human/input-blocked, not in flight. Because both per-thesis verdicts are already INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING, no pending item can REVERSE a FEASIBLE/NOT-FEASIBLE call (there is none to reverse): each verdict-moving item RESOLVES the pending INCONCLUSIVE, each refine-only item narrows an envelope.
backing_ref: docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md section 3; registry/experiments/{g3-llmproxy-v3,knull,g2,g3,f2b-transfer,a-f0-mint-economics}.json; docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md sections 3 and 7; tools/registry/audit-status.py ledger
rationale: The task authorised authoring the definitive standing verdict unless an in-flight item is load-bearing enough to require waiting; neither in-flight item is (one is a non-discharging weak proxy, the other is a pre-run control repair), so waiting would add latency without changing the standing call.
resolution_path: Supersede on read-out of any verdict-moving PENDING item in section 3; g3-llmproxy-v3 and the knull rewrite, when they land, are logged as refinements/preconditions and do not by themselves move the standing verdict.

claim: Cross-thesis reachability-wall-on-coverage-wall reading (interpretive colour for the capstone; NEVER a premise, load-bearing for nothing; extends ASM-0721 to the efficiency thesis). The programme's measured evidence across BOTH theses is consistent with one shape: the kernel's deterministic machinery is exact and sound INSIDE its own closed grammar / self-authored substrate (l3a/a5 gold-replication identical 527/527 and 855/855; g8 F/B round-trip 33/33; engine exactness 100% on gold), while there is a COVERAGE wall (does the kernel contain the target: g8 0/1000 random Mathlib, m0b 0.3542 friendliest corpus, compression-census ~0.6% roll-up engagement, b-cov-define-lane 0/1550 external items) and, stacked on it, a REACHABILITY wall (even for content the kernel DOES contain and CAN decide perfectly under gold parse, natural language cannot reliably ADDRESS it through the pinned a1-hybrid front-end: l3a-parse 47.6%, a5-nl 41.6%). The one audited efficiency positive (f2b +0.1507) lives strictly inside the fortress (formal, self-authored, alignment-specific), and the neighbouring PASS (truthstyle-2x2) is instrument-adequacy not kernel content. Each constituent figure is index-bound to its own verdict's envelope; the conjunction is direction-only and is confirmed or broken only by the pre-registered per-boundary successors.
rationale: The pattern is the most consistent thing the registry shows and is worth stating for the maintainer, but it aggregates figures across incommensurable envelopes, so it must remain EXTRAPOLATION and may never premise any verdict.
resolution_path: Each boundary is confirmed or broken by its own pre-registered successor (FK-NLB-3 for the NL wall; the bulk-authoring re-entry for the wild-formal wall; nsk1 Stage-1+ for the model-internal channel); the reading dissolves into per-boundary MEASURED facts as those land.

claim: knull-v2 full plain-arm re-authoring + custody (executes the ASM-0700 required remediation and the docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md section 7 plan under the maintainer-ratified ASM-0703 gate): all 108 plain-dictionary definitions were re-authored to the maintainer's lexicographic standard (edited general-dictionary English - genus + differentiae, genuine sense divisions, contrastive distinction; no exemplification-by-listing, no consequence or observer narration, no anaphoric renaming, gender-neutral modern register; the ball and make word-aptness lapses the v3 sample flagged are fixed) in poc/knull/inputs-v2/plain-authored.json (v2.0.2). Custody follows the g3-llmproxy-v2 supersession pattern (ASM-0651): a SUPERSEDING DRAFT record registry/experiments/knull-v2.json (supersedes: knull) carries fresh v2 paths - builder poc/knull/build_inputs_v2.py, lint driver poc/knull/lint_plain_store_v2.py wrapping the frozen-pinned G-1 contract poc/knull/lint_plain_store.py byte-untouched, checker poc/knull/check_token_band_v2.py, output tree poc/knull/inputs-v2/ - while the FROZEN v1 record knull (frozen_sha256 9b2065c6f18797f0754097155893f499330eca1f84cf92272836050e2b0266bb) and its poc/knull/inputs/ tree are byte-UNTOUCHED history and are never run. Pre-freeze gates re-run green on the v2 store: G-1 full v1 contract (D-1, L-1..L-5, R-1..R-4) PASS; G-3 pinned-SmolLM2-tokenizer token band PASS (plain/kernel mean-prompt-token ratio 1.001, opaque 1.004, inside the +/-10 percent pre-freeze band); item type mix re-derived and IDENTICAL ACROSS ARMS (all-1080 324 def-match / 324 term-match / 56 claim-true / 376 claim-false, unchanged from v1 - the re-authoring did not shift the joint-substitution outcome). knull-v2 is left DRAFT; the coordinator/runner freezes.
backing_ref: poc/knull/inputs-v2/plain-authored.json (sha256 2536a2944ab381657cf0aa9d4412f5c8b00be65ac388e80621599fcf645f74d0); registry/experiments/knull-v2.json; poc/knull/inputs-v2/g1-lint-report.json; poc/knull/inputs-v2/g3-token-band.json; docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md section 7
rationale: ASM-0700 ruled the mechanically-defective v1 plain control a one-sided confound and re-authoring to the maintainer standard a REQUIRED precondition of the knull GPU campaign. The frozen v1 record pins the plain-source sha inside its manifest, so a content rewrite cannot be an ops amendment - it needs a superseding record, exactly the g3-llmproxy-v2 pattern. The matching contract (L-3 word band, L-4 segments, R-2 register, G-3 token parity) is preserved byte-for-byte so the ablation stays valid; only the plain arm's authored bytes change.
resolution_path: coordinator freezes knull-v2 after the ASM-0706 maintainer fork decision on the gate reading; RT-15 external timestamp at freeze

claim: knull-v2 blind full-108 quality-gate RESULT under the ratified ASM-0703 two-part rule (zero defect-class findings AND blind naturalness >= 5/10, both judge families), instrument per ASM-0701 blinding (headwords withheld, definition texts only, no project/NSM/experiment context, the judge never told a gate or a comparison set exists) with TWO families: GPT-5.6 (codex-cli 0.144.1 exec, reasoning effort high, read-only, ephemeral, empty out-of-repo workdir) and Claude Haiku 4.5 (headless claude -p per poc/truthstyle-2x2/judges-invocation.md section 4.3 + 4.3.1; per-call init.tools==[] and init.mcp_servers==[] and apiKeySource=none and num_turns==1 asserted, blinding grep of the captures clean each call). Four blind reads across the editing trajectory: GPT-5.6 overall-naturalness 4 / 5 / 4 / 4, Claude Haiku 4.5 3 / 4 / 3 / 3; on the COMMITTED store (v2.0.2) GPT-5.6 = 4/10 and Haiku = 3/10. Defect classes on the committed store: BOTH families report anaphoric-renaming NONE and staged-observers NONE; residual findings are rotating LOCAL register/word-choice nits (high inter-run variance - each read names a largely different set on near-identical prose) plus a few non-definitional-material flags landing on the mandatory >=2nd claim segment. RESULT: the ratified gate is NOT met on the committed store - the naturalness >=5 floor is reached by NEITHER family, and the defect-class count is nonzero for both. Raw evidence poc/knull/quality-gate-v2/gate.new108.v2r*.{gpt56,haiku}.raw.md.

knull-v2 quality-gate ESCALATION ruling (designer epistemic call; the party being graded does not self-certify a freeze precondition). Because ASM-0705 measures the ratified ASM-0703 gate as NOT met on the committed store (GPT-5.6 4/10, Haiku 3/10, both below the >=5 floor, defect-class count nonzero for both), and because the shortfall reproduces the STRUCTURAL pattern ASM-0703 predicted - both judge families explicitly attribute the naturalness ceiling to the uniformly ~2x-natural-length, semicolon-heavy prose forced by the frozen L-3 word band (vs 16-56-word NSM glosses) and the L-4 >=2-segment rule, not to fixable authoring; the mandatory second segment draws a fresh non-definitional flag on nearly every entry, and the register nits do not converge across reads - knull-v2 is HELD DRAFT and the freeze precondition is ESCALATED to the maintainer with the SAME three-way fork ASM-0703 named, now confirmed on a SECOND judge family: (a) accept a relaxed floor reading - e.g. best-of-family, or a single pinned anchor-judge >= 5, WITH the two hardest defect classes (anaphoric renaming, staged observers) measured at ZERO in both families, which the committed store meets - and proceed; (b) relax the L-3/L-4 matching contract to buy genuine pocket-dictionary length, at the cost of the FLOPs-parity instrument plus a deeper redesign and a new record; or (c) keep the gate strict, leaving H-KN2 / PASS-CONTENT unlicensable (ASM-0700) and running knull-v2 for its deflationary readings only. Designer recommendation is unchanged from ASM-0703: (a). No self-loosening of the ratified rule by the designer; the maintainer decides, and the ratified rule is pinned in knull-v2's prefreeze evidence at freeze.
rationale: A gate whose ceiling is set by a frozen budget constraint (matched token budgets), not by the quality being judged, cannot fairly gate that quality - the point of ASM-0703's split rule. The measured two-family result confirms the ceiling is structural: the committed store already clears the two defect classes that encode the maintainer's hardest standards (no anaphoric renaming, no staged observers) in both families, while the naturalness number stays pinned by length/shape. Ratifying a floor loosening is a maintainer call, never the graded party's, so the designer escalates rather than self-certifies.
resolution_path: maintainer picks fork (a)/(b)/(c) at review of docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md + the knull-v2 gate evidence; the chosen rule is pinned in knull-v2's prefreeze_gates_evidence before freeze

claim: Interpretive reading of the knull-v2 blind-gate trajectory (colour for the maintainer fork; never a premise, load-bearing for nothing): the four reads' variance (GPT-5.6 4/5/4/4, Haiku 3/4/3/3, each round naming a largely DIFFERENT set of local register nits on near-identical prose) indicates the naturalness score is anchored on the word-band-forced expansiveness rather than on any fixable diction, so further local editing is not expected to lift BOTH families to >=5 with zero defect-class findings under the frozen L-3/L-4 contract; a genuinely pocket-dictionary rendering would require fork (b). This is an expectation, not a measurement of an unreachable bound.
resolution_path: the ASM-0706 maintainer fork decision; if fork (b), a length-relaxed plain store re-judged by the same blind instrument measures the length/naturalness relationship directly and converts this expectation to a measurement

claim: Programme-3 north-star operationalisation (design/goal choice, not evidence). (1) 'AI index' := KOT-AI-INDEX/1 — a versioned, pinned macro-average over a fixed benchmark suite evaluated ONLY under the programme's own pinned harness (own-harness numbers are the comparator; published card numbers are anchors only): at rungs R-0..R-2 the SmolLM2-anchor suite (HellaSwag, ARC-E/C, PIQA, MMLU-cloze, CommonsenseQA, WinoGrande, OpenBookQA, GSM8K; TriviaQA licence-gated) per docs/next/benchmark-evaluation-strategy.md section 1.1; at R-3+ the suite extends with MMLU-Pro, BBH, and one code benchmark, as a NEW index version. (2) 'size' := KOT-SIZE/1 — raw on-disk bytes of the complete frozen deployment artifact needed to serve the eval (weights as serialized at their stored precision + kernel store + world-layer + indices + GNN/adapter/rule components + tokenizer + all non-base-image code), measured against a pinned common base image; zstd-19 bytes co-reported. (3) 'inference cost' := KOT-COST/1 — dual ledger: analytic FLOPs/query for neural components AND measured wall-clock + peak RSS + energy per query on pinned hardware for the WHOLE system including symbolic components; a compute-matched claim must hold on BOTH ledgers. (4) Win condition W1 and shrink objective W2 as stated verbatim in docs/next/programme-3-neurosymbolic-architecture.md section 1.4.
rationale: The maintainer's goal ('higher AI index than all models of same size and compute; then minimise size') is not measurable until 'AI index', 'size', and 'compute' are pinned. These are design choices: the SmolLM2 suite is chosen because the programme's host family publishes against it and the harness-pinning design already exists (benchmark-evaluation-strategy.md); on-disk bytes is chosen because parameters cannot measure a neurosymbolic system's size (maintainer directive); the dual cost ledger is chosen because symbolic operations have no canonical FLOP equivalent.
notes: Programme-3 design doc. Any change to the suite, size recipe, or ledger is an index/recipe VERSION change and re-baselines every comparison.

claim: Programme-3 fair-comparison protocol (design choice). (1) Baseline ladder: published card numbers = anchors only, never comparators; own-harness re-evaluations of open pure-neural models in the same KOT-SIZE/1 band (+/-10 percent bytes) = the PRIMARY comparator; training-compute-matched from-scratch neural baselines = required comparator only at rungs where the neurosymbolic arm itself trains from scratch. (2) 'Same compute' binds on INFERENCE compute (both KOT-COST/1 ledgers); training compute is always reported and is enforced as matched only at ground-up rungs. (3) Mandatory control set for ANY claimed neurosymbolic win: kernel-as-text null, seed-pinned deranged-store control, aligned-non-kernel-store control (the knull lesson), and a benchmark-decontamination audit of kernel+world store vs eval items (n-gram + embedding screen) — a win that fails decontamination is void, not caveated.
rationale: f2b-replicate demonstrated that an end-task lift can be correct-alignment-specific rather than content-specific, and l3a/a5 demonstrated that published-vs-own-harness comparisons are non-comparable across variant/harness cells; the protocol mechanises those two lessons before any Programme-3 number exists. Inference-compute-primacy is chosen because the maintainer's objective is a deployed-system property.
notes: Inherits the mandatory-controls discipline from kot-reg/1. The decontamination audit is new to Programme-3 because the kernel/world store, unlike weights, can trivially embed benchmark answer keys.

claim: Programme-3 architecture design-space enumeration and naming (scoping decision): the candidate families are H-VL (verifier-loop system, external), H-GNN-{ST,KV,LF} (graph-encoder fusion via soft-tokens, KV-side memory, or late fusion), H-RULE-{CD,KV,AD,ACT,HL} (rules inference at constrained-decoding, KV-side, adapter, activation-steering, or dedicated-hidden-layer placement), H-RB (retrieve-vs-bake store placement fork), H-GU (ground-up neurosymbolic training), and H-DD (dimension-drop of an existing model). The enumeration claims coverage of the maintainer's directed directions plus the seams Programme-2 already built; it does NOT claim any family works — each carries only the evidence its cited verdicts license, and several start from measured negatives.
rationale: A finite named hypothesis list is required so lit-reviews, design tasks, and kill criteria attach to stable identifiers; naming is a scoping choice that creates no evidence. Families are seeded from the maintainer's brief (GNN, rules-in-LLM, ground-up vs dimension-drop) and from the L0-L4 ladder already designed in docs/next/architecture-ladder.md.
notes: Any additional family found by Phase-0 lit reviews is appended as H-* by a Phase-1 design task, not silently merged.

claim: Programme-3 scaling ladder (design choice): rungs R-0 (1-30M params-equivalent, synthetic/TinyStories-class data, CPU or single free GPU), R-1 (100-200M, SmolLM2-135M anchor), R-2 (300-500M, SmolLM2-360M anchor), R-3 (1-2B, SmolLM2-1.7B anchor), R-4 (3-8B, gated). Promotion gate: an architecture family may occupy rung R-(k+1) only if at rung R-k it (a) beat its matched control set on the rung's pre-registered primary endpoint or (b) was explicitly promoted by a maintainer fork overriding a diagnosed instrument failure. Kill: a family that fails its primary at two consecutive rungs, or whose R-0/R-1 falsifier fires, is closed at scope. Real-GPU spend above the free-credit pool is gated per rung by the maintainer.
rationale: The maintainer directed starting at very small scale to cheaply learn which architectures work, then continuously scaling; the rung boundaries are chosen to reuse the SmolLM2 anchors the programme already measures against and to keep R-0/R-1 inside the free-compute pool documented in docs/next/free-compute-recon.md.
notes: Rung boundaries are bytes-and-cost bands under KOT-SIZE/1 and KOT-COST/1, not parameter counts; the parameter figures are orientation only.

claim: The dimension-drop hypothesis (H-DD, maintainer direction (b)): in an existing small LM, the hidden dimensions/subspaces corresponding to concepts encoded in the kernel+world store can be identified, basis-normalised (rotated axis-aligned), and ~80 percent of them dropped — yielding a ~5x smaller model that, together with the kernel+world store, retains language capability and index performance. This is a forward projection with NO current measured support: nsk1 left model-internal integration UNRESOLVED, m0b coverage is 0.3542 on the friendliest corpus at the measured kernel state, and no experiment has shown ANY correspondence between kernel concept vectors and a host model's principal hidden subspaces.
resolution_path: P3-E-DD-1 (Phase-2, gated on P3-D-DD design and P3-LR-COMP lit review): pre-registered central-claim test at R-1 comparing concept-aligned drop vs random-subspace drop of equal rank vs magnitude/structured pruning at equal KOT-SIZE/1 bytes, all measured on KOT-AI-INDEX/1 with and without the kernel+world store attached. If concept-aligned drop is not superior to the random-subspace control, the alignment story is dead at scope and only the generic-compression rider survives.
notes: Never a premise. The 80 percent / 5x figures are the maintainer's target, carried verbatim as the hypothesis under test, not as an expectation.

claim: The GNN-fusion projection (H-GNN): because the kernel and world layer hold relational data, a graph-neural encoder over that graph, fused into a small LM (soft-token, KV-side, or late fusion), will outperform the same LM given the same graph serialised as text, at matched KOT-COST/1 inference cost. Forward projection: the trained-bridge seam has one replicated positive (E5 adapter) but nsk1 measured text-delivered grounding NET-HARMFUL and internal delivery only echo-grade with integration unresolved, so delivery-without-integration is a live failure mode for any fusion variant.
resolution_path: P3-E-GNN-1 (Phase-2, gated on P3-D-GNN and P3-LR-GNN): R-0/R-1 pre-registered test of GNN-encoder fusion vs text-of-graph vs no-graph controls at matched inference cost on a relational-question slice plus the full index for non-regression.
notes: Never a premise.

claim: The internal-rules projection (H-RULE): building deterministic rule evaluation INTO the model (at one of the five enumerated placements — constrained-decoding head, KV-side memory, adapter, activation steering, dedicated hidden layer) achieves the external verifier-loop's accuracy effect at materially lower inference cost, or higher accuracy at matched cost. Forward projection: the external loop has the programme's one audited end-task efficiency SIGN (f2b-replicate, formal inputs, alignment-confounded), while every measured deep-internal channel is unresolved (nsk1) — no internal placement has any positive evidence yet.
resolution_path: P3-E-RULE-1 (Phase-2, gated on P3-D-RULE and P3-LR-RULE): R-1 pre-registered head-to-head of the two cheapest placements (constrained-decoding, KV-side) against the external verifier-loop H-VL at matched accuracy targets, decided on the KOT-COST/1 dual ledger.
notes: Never a premise.
